cards.heading: A5 Landscape Page
cards.text: This template uses @page to set a custom page size and margin. With preferCSSPageSize enabled in Playwright, CSS page dimensions control the output page box.

cards.heading: Color Adjust
cards.text: The sample uses print-color-adjust and -webkit-print-color-adjust to preserve background colors in print output where supported.

cards.heading: Break Safety
cards.text: Cards use break-inside: avoid so individual blocks are less likely to split between pages.
